panels.description: Number of Zone Egress proxy replicas connected to the control plane.
panels.title: Zone Egress connected

panels.description: Uptime of each Zone Egress proxy replica.
panels.title: Egress Uptime (per replica)

panels.description: Days until the soonest-expiring certificate on any zone proxy.
panels.title: Min Cert Expiry

panels.description:
Active downstream connections on each zone proxy.

Terminology: **downstream** = incoming side (local mesh proxies connecting to this Zone Egress); **upstream** = outgoing side (remote zones / external services this Zone Egress connects to).
panels.title: Active Downstream Connections

panels.description:
Upstream request rate handled by each zone proxy.

Terminology: **downstream** = incoming side (local mesh proxies connecting to this Zone Egress); **upstream** = outgoing side (remote zones / external services this Zone Egress connects to).
panels.title: Upstream Request Rate

panels.description: Heap memory used by each zone proxy's Envoy process.
panels.title: Proxy Memory (heap)
Zone Egress  -  outbound traffic to other zones & external services

panels.description: Each Zone Egress replica's connection to the Zone control plane.
panels.title: CP Connected (per replica)

panels.description: Active downstream connections from local proxies into the Zone Egress.
panels.title: Active Downstream Cx

panels.description: New downstream connection rate into the Zone Egress.
panels.title: Downstream Cx Rate

panels.description: Upstream request rate to other zones and external services.
panels.title: Upstream Req Rate

panels.description: Failed upstream connection attempts from the Zone Egress.
panels.title: Upstream Cx Failures

panels.description:
Connection rate through the Zone Egress: downstream from local proxies, upstream to zones / external services.

Terminology: **downstream** = incoming side (local mesh proxies connecting to this Zone Egress); **upstream** = outgoing side (remote zones / external services this Zone Egress connects to).
panels.title: Zone Egress  -  Connection Rate

panels.description:
Upstream throughput (bytes sent + received) through the Zone Egress.

`rx` = bytes received from the peer, `tx` = bytes transmitted to the peer.
panels.title: Zone Egress  -  Throughput

panels.description: Upstream request rate from the Zone Egress, by destination cluster (other zones and external services).

targets.expr: label_replace(sum by (pod, envoy_cluster_name) (rate(envoy_cluster_upstream_rq_total{job="kuma-zone-proxies", namespace=~"$namespace", zone=~"$zone", proxy="egress", envoy_cluster_name!~"kuma_.*|_kuma_.*|access_log_sink|.*passthrough.*|.*transparentproxy.*"}[$__rate_interval])), "replica", "$2", "pod", "^kuma-default-(ingress|egress)-[^-]+-(.+)$")

panels.title: Zone Egress  -  Upstream Request Rate by Destination

panels.description: p95 upstream connection establishment time from the Zone Egress.

targets.expr: label_replace(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (pod, le, envoy_cluster_name) (rate(envoy_cluster_upstream_cx_connect_ms_bucket{job="kuma-zone-proxies", namespace=~"$namespace", zone=~"$zone", proxy="egress", envoy_cluster_name!~"kuma_.*|_kuma_.*|access_log_sink|.*passthrough.*|.*transparentproxy.*"}[$__rate_interval]))), "replica", "$2", "pod", "^kuma-default-(ingress|egress)-[^-]+-(.+)$")

panels.title: Zone Egress  -  Upstream Connect Latency (p95)

panels.description: Healthy endpoints in each upstream cluster of the Zone Egress.

targets.expr: label_replace(sum by (pod, envoy_cluster_name) (envoy_cluster_membership_healthy{job="kuma-zone-proxies", namespace=~"$namespace", zone=~"$zone", proxy="egress", envoy_cluster_name!~"kuma_.*|_kuma_.*|access_log_sink|.*passthrough.*|.*transparentproxy.*"}), "replica", "$2", "pod", "^kuma-default-(ingress|egress)-[^-]+-(.+)$")

panels.title: Zone Egress  -  Upstream Cluster Health

panels.description: mTLS handshakes and verification failures on the Zone Egress listener.
panels.title: Zone Egress  -  mTLS Handshakes & Failures
MeshExternalServices  -  external traffic via Zone Egress

panels.description: Aggregate request rate to all MeshExternalServices.
panels.title: MeshExternalService - Request Rate

panels.description: Active upstream connections to MeshExternalServices.
panels.title: MeshExternalService - Active Connections

panels.description: Failed connection attempts to MeshExternalService endpoints.
panels.title: MeshExternalService - Connect Failures

panels.description: Upstream response codes returned by MeshExternalServices, by class.
panels.title: MeshExternalService  -  Response Codes

panels.description: p95 connection establishment time to MeshExternalService endpoints.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, envoy_cluster_name) (rate(envoy_cluster_upstream_cx_connect_ms_bucket{job="kuma-zone-proxies", namespace=~"$namespace", zone=~"$zone", envoy_cluster_name=~"kri_extsvc_.+_($mes)_[0-9]+"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: MeshExternalService  -  Connect Latency (p95)

panels.description: Throughput (bytes sent + received) to MeshExternalServices.
panels.title: MeshExternalService  -  Throughput

panels.description: Per-MeshExternalService summary: active connections, healthy endpoints and connect failure rate.
Number of clusters with an open circuit breaker (the proxy is shedding load).
panels.title: Circuit Breakers Open

panels.description: Upstream request retries and timeouts across the zone proxy clusters.
panels.title: Upstream Retries & Timeouts

panels.description: Requests dropped because the pending queue or the connection pool overflowed.
panels.title: Request Queue & Pool Saturation

panels.description: Connections rejected at the zone proxy listener (global limit overflow or overload manager).
panels.title: Rejected Downstream Connections

panels.description: Upstream connections closed by the remote end while a request was still active.
panels.title: Abnormal Upstream Disconnects

panels.description: Event-loop watchdog misses - the zone proxy's Envoy is starved of CPU.
panels.title: Envoy Watchdog Misses

panels.description: Response codes returned by external / cross-zone destinations to the Zone Egress, by class.
panels.title: Zone Egress  -  Upstream Response Codes
Config Delivery Health  -  zone proxy xDS

panels.description: Config updates rejected by the zone proxy. Any sustained value means the CP pushed config the proxy could not accept.
panels.title: xDS Update Rejections (NACKs)

panels.description: Config requests in flight between the zone proxy and the control plane.
panels.title: xDS Config Requests Pending

panels.description: Config updates accepted by the zone proxy. CDS / LDS ACKs from the CP.
panels.title: xDS Update Acceptance (ACKs)
